name: Security Audit
description: Comprehensive security assessment and vulnerability mitigation

steps.description: Identify potential security threats and attack vectors
steps.exit_criteria: Threat model complete with identified vulnerabilities

steps.description: Review code for security vulnerabilities and best practices
steps.exit_criteria: Code reviewed for OWASP Top 10 and common vulnerabilities

steps.description: Perform security testing and penetration testing
steps.exit_criteria: Security testing complete with documented findings

steps.description: Implement fixes for identified security vulnerabilities
Verify vulnerabilities are fixed and no new issues introduced
steps.exit_criteria: All critical vulnerabilities fixed and verified

success_criteria: All critical and high-severity vulnerabilities fixed, security best practices implemented, compliance verified
